Join IAAA
National Non-Profit Professional Body

Empowering India's Aerospace Future

IAAA is a registered non-profit trust dedicated to advancing India's aerospace and aviation sector. We bridge academia, industry, and entrepreneurship through globally-recognized education, hands-on training, and innovation programs accredited by DGCA, NSDC, and CTDS Tamil Nadu.

Join IAAA NowExplore ProgramsStartup Forum

Building India's Future

From School to Sky

Active Members

0
Industry Partners
About IAAA

A Bridge Between Learning and Real-World Aerospace

IAAA connects education and industry through hands-on learning, research, and entrepreneurship. As a registered non-profit trust and association accredited by CTDS TN, we provide globally recognized aerospace education, technical training, and professional development.

Education

Globally recognized aerospace courses and diplomas

Innovation

Startup support and research incubation

Collaboration

Industry-academia partnerships nationwide

Recognition

Certifications aligned with DGCA and NSDC

Learn More About IAAA

Our Vision

Make aerospace education accessible, practical, and industry-oriented across India.

IAAA PTDC

Professional Training & Development Centre

Learn, Build, Intern - The IAAA Way. Globally recognized diplomas, certifications, and industry internships.

Degree

B.S. Program by IIT Madras

Data Science & Aerospace Applications. No JEE Required.

Diploma

Aircraft Maintenance Technician

One-year diploma for MRO & AME careers.

Diploma

AMT with NDT Specialization

Level II Certification (UT, RT, PT, MT, VT).

Diploma

Drone Architecture

Design, Assembly, Flight Operations & Industry Use.

Training

Short-Term Training

Airline Operations, AME, NDT, Composites.

Training

Career-Focused NDT

Job-ready with international Level II certification.

Explore All Programs
Membership

Join India's Largest Aerospace Learning Network

Connect with 10,000+ members across 100+ institutions nationwide.

Most Popular

Student Membership

₹1,000/year
  • 4-10 certified courses per year
  • National contests & internships
  • Workshops and training programs
  • Official IAAA certificate
  • Career support & mentorship
Join as Student

Professional Membership

FreeVolunteer
  • Network with industry leaders
  • Mentor student members
  • Contribute to research initiatives
  • Professional recognition
  • Event participation
Apply as Professional

Institutional Membership

CustomPricing
  • Host IAAA Collegiate Clubs
  • Establish Regional Hubs
  • Run PTDC Centres
  • Faculty development programs
  • National recognition
